notes: Generated with built-in image generation after rejecting the first draft for excessive form size growth.

The accepted source sheet pushes the Serpent Medic Rig toward darker neon future-war robot language while keeping four roughly same-footprint evolution stages, one static nanite munition, and one disabled wreck.
Background was first removed from the green chroma-key source with a strict no-despill pass plus edge contraction, then repaired after visual review found alpha damage in the medic-green cores.
The repair pass restored enclosed green-dominant reactor/canister holes from the original chroma source, then suppressed only exterior semi-transparent green fringe.
The transparent source scanned as exactly six large alpha groups with 45, 38, 34, 96, and 76px gutters at threshold 24.

Runtime frames were grouped-mask sliced to avoid neighbor bleed from the close Mk3/Mk4 gutters; final frame checks found transparent corners, zero tiny-alpha dust, zero semi-transparent green pixels, and zero nontransparent border pixels.
